sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80611" key="penixrale/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πενιχρ-ᾰλέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, collat. form of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πενιχρός</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.190</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gaet.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
